# `economy/state_per_capita_nsdp_current_inr`

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `python -m yen_gov indicator-pages`. Do not hand-edit. -->

**Title**: State per-capita Net State Domestic Product (current prices)  
**One-line**: Net State Domestic Product (NSDP) per person, in current prices.  
**Source artifact last modified**: 2026-05-16 (auto-generated)  
**Source artifact**: [`datasets/indicators/in/economy/state_per_capita_nsdp_current_inr.json`](../../../../datasets/indicators/in/economy/state_per_capita_nsdp_current_inr.json)

## Definition

Net State Domestic Product (NSDP) per person, in current prices. Sourced from NITI Aayog ICED dashboard (state-wise deep-dive), originally compiled by MoSPI from State DES estimates. Per-capita NSDP is the standard income comparator across states; constant-price series strips out inflation for real growth comparisons.

## Coverage

- **Temporal**: 2004-04..2023-04 (20 periods)
- **Spatial**: India (states + UTs) (33 entities)
- **Rows on disk**: 652

## Methodology vintage

MoSPI / State DES; NSDP per-capita series

## Denominator

| field | value |
| --- | --- |
| what | `state mid-year population (MoSPI / RGI)` |
| price_basis | `current` |
| source_artifact | `demography/state_population_lakhs` |
| note | `Per-capita = NSDP ÷ state mid-year population estimate` |
